palette: Brushed aluminum, warm cedar wood, and harsh cyan neon (the MUJI vs Huaqiangbei contrast)
lighting: Low-angle afternoon sun through heavy pollution haze, mixed with flickering cool-white LED interiors
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A minimalist hotel room desk made of reclaimed wood, a pair of sleek black smart glasses resting next to a white ceramic tea cup. Large window in the background shows a blurred, dense cityscape of Shenzhen skyscrapers under a hazy grey sky. High-tech minimalist aesthetic. Microscale detail on the wood grain.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Looking down from a high balcony at the neon-soaked intersection of Huaqiangbei at dusk. Swarms of tiny electric scooters and pedestrians. The world feels enormous and chaotic. Motion blur on the street lights. Palette of electric blue and deep shadows.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Macro shot of a cluttered electronics market stall. Bins of tiny green circuit boards, spools of copper wire, and silver sensor modules. Harsh overhead fluorescent lighting. Gritty industrial texture. The scale makes the components look like a miniature city.
